requirements.summary: Reduce the watermark opacity by an additional 50 percent from the current level in frontend/src/index.css to make it significantly darker and more visible
acceptanceCriteria: The watermark opacity in frontend/src/index.css is reduced by 50 percent from its current value
The watermark is visibly darker across all pages (Home, About Us, Products, ProductDetail, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact Us, and Admin)
The watermark remains properly positioned and does not obstruct page content

file_operations.description: Update the watermark background styling to reduce the opacity by 50 percent from its current value (e.g., if current opacity is 0.1, change it to 0.15; if 0.2, change to 0.3). Locate the watermark background rule and modify only the opacity value while preserving the image source, positioning, size, and all other styling properties.
